name: Shin Nippon Biomedical Lab.LtdR
summary: Shin Nippon Biomedical Lab.LtdR is a Japanese contract research organization (CRO) providing preclinical and clinical research services to pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies. The company offers a wide range of services, including safety testing, efficacy studies, and pharmacokinetic analysis. Shin Nippon Biomedical Laboratories is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
